label.purpose: Form labels, badges, tab triggers, button text.

mono.purpose: Secrets, tokens, client IDs, CPF masks.

caption.purpose: Compact buttons (sm size) and dense labels; 0.8rem.

shadows.name: none-at-rest
shadows.purpose: The only 'lift' on cards/popovers: a 1px tonal ring, not a drop shadow.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action — CTech Cobalt fill, white text, 32px tall.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; height:2rem; padding:0 0.625rem; font:500 0.875rem/1 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; color:var(--primary-foreground); background:var(--primary); border:1px solid transparent; border-radius:var(--radius); cursor:pointer; transition:background .15s ease, transform .1s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:oklch(0.55 0.22 258 / 0.8); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform:translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:none; border-color:var(--ring); box-shadow:0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring) 70%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity:.5; pointer-events:none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action — white fill, hairline border, ink text.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; height:2rem; padding:0 0.625rem; font:500 0.875rem/1 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; color:var(--foreground); background:var(--background); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--radius); cursor:pointer; transition:background .15s ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background:var(--muted); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline:none; border-color:var(--ring); box-shadow:0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring) 70%, transparent); } .ds-btn-outline:disabled { opacity:.5; pointer-events:none; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Low-emphasis action — transparent fill, ink text.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; height:2rem; padding:0 0.625rem; font:500 0.875rem/1 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; color:var(--foreground); background:transparent; border:1px solid transparent; border-radius:var(--radius); cursor:pointer; transition:background .15s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background:var(--muted); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline:none; border-color:var(--ring); box-shadow:0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring) 70%, transparent); }

components.name: Input
components.description: Text field — hairline border, cobalt focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { height:2rem; width:100%; padding:0.25rem 0.625rem; font:400 0.875rem/1.5 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; color:var(--foreground); background:transparent; border:1px solid var(--input); border-radius:var(--radius); outline:none; transition:border-color .15s ease, box-shadow .15s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color:var(--muted-foreground); } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color:var(--ring); box-shadow:0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring) 70%, transparent); } .ds-input[aria-invalid="true"] { border-color:var(--destructive); box-shadow:0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--destructive) 20%, transparent); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity:.5; cursor:not-allowed; background:color-mix(in oklch, var(--input) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Surface container — flat, 1px tonal ring, no drop shadow.
components.html: Active sessionsYou are signed in on 2 devices.
components.css: .ds-card { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:1rem; padding:1rem; background:var(--card); color:var(--card-foreground); border-radius:calc(var(--radius) * 1.4); box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--foreground) 10%, transparent); font:400 0.875rem/1.5 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Pill status — default cobalt; used for Verified / Pending / Linked / Revoked.
components.html: Verified
components.css: .ds-badge { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:0.25rem; height:1.25rem; padding:0 0.5rem; font:500 0.75rem/1 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; color:var(--primary-foreground); background:var(--primary); border:1px solid transparent; border-radius:calc(var(--radius) * 2.6); white-space:nowrap; }

components.name: Alert
components.description: Inline message — hairline border, Surface fill, icon + text.
components.html: Email verifiedYou can now sign in with your password.
components.css: .ds-alert { display:grid; grid-template-columns:auto 1fr; gap:0.5rem; padding:0.5rem 0.625rem; font:400 0.875rem/1.5 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; color:var(--card-foreground); background:var(--card); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--radius); } .ds-alert svg { width:1rem; height:1rem; grid-row:span 2; transform:translateY(0.125rem); color:var(--primary); } .ds-alert-desc { grid-column:2; color:var(--muted-foreground); }

components.name: Account Nav Item
components.description: Active sidebar item — cobalt text + cobalt-tinted well.
components.html: Security
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.5rem; padding:0.5rem 0.75rem; font:500 0.875rem/1 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; color:var(--primary); background:color-mix(in oklch, var(--primary) 10%, transparent); border-radius:calc(var(--radius) * 0.8); text-decoration:none; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background:color-mix(in oklch, var(--primary) 15%, transparent); }

components.name: Dialog
components.description: Modal surface — Surface popover, 1px ring, zoom-in + fade on open.
components.html: Revoke session?This device will be signed out immediately.
components.css: .ds-dialog-overlay { position:fixed; inset:0; background:rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); backdrop-filter:blur(2px); } .ds-dialog { position:relative; width:100%; max-width:448px; padding:1rem; background:var(--popover); color:var(--popover-foreground); border-radius:calc(var(--radius) * 1.4); box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--foreground) 10%, transparent); font:400 0.875rem/1.5 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Confirm Dialog
components.description: Signature destructive-action gate — replaces native confirm() across 7 sites. Destructive variant leads with an AlertTriangle icon.
components.html:
Revoke session?
This device will be signed out immediately.
components.css: .ds-confirm-overlay { position:fixed; inset:0; background:rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); backdrop-filter:blur(2px); } .ds-confirm { position:relative; width:100%; max-width:448px; padding:1rem; background:var(--popover); color:var(--popover-foreground); border-radius:calc(var(--radius) * 1.4); box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--foreground) 10%, transparent); font:400 0.875rem/1.5 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; animation:ds-confirm-in .15s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } @keyframes ds-confirm-in { from { opacity:0; transform:scale(.95); } to { opacity:1; transform:none; } } .ds-confirm-head { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:.5rem; font:600 1rem/1.25 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; color:var(--foreground); } .ds-confirm-head svg { color:var(--destructive); } .ds-confirm-desc { display:block; margin-top:.25rem; color:var(--muted-foreground); } .ds-confirm-footer { display:flex; justify-content:flex-end; gap:.5rem; margin-top:1rem; padding-top:.75rem; border-top:1px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--foreground) 10%, transparent); } .ds-confirm-cancel { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; height:2rem; padding:0 .625rem; font:500 .875rem/1 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; color:var(--foreground); background:var(--background); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--radius); cursor:pointer; transition:background .15s ease; } .ds-confirm-cancel:hover { background:var(--muted); } .ds-confirm-cancel:focus-visible { outline:none; border-color:var(--ring); box-shadow:0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring) 70%, transparent); } .ds-confirm-confirm { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; height:2rem; padding:0 .625rem; font:500 .875rem/1 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; color:var(--destructive); background:color-mix(in oklch, var(--destructive) 10%, transparent); border:1px solid transparent; border-radius:var(--radius); cursor:pointer; transition:background .15s ease; } .ds-confirm-confirm:hover { background:color-mix(in oklch, var(--destructive) 15%, transparent); } .ds-confirm-confirm:focus-visible { outline:none; border-color:var(--destructive); box-shadow:0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--destructive) 30%, transparent); } .ds-confirm-confirm:disabled { opacity:.5; pointer-events:none; }

narrative.overview: CTech Account is the identity console for the aoctech.app platform — where people sign in, enforce MFA and passkeys, review sessions and consents, verify identity (KYC), and where developers register OAuth apps and API keys. Security is present on every surface but reads as calm competence, never as a wall of warnings. One cobalt accent, flat tonal surfaces, Geist everywhere. The system explicitly rejects Generic pastel SaaS, Gamified consumer, Dense enterprise gray, and Dark-mode hacker aesthetics.
keyCharacteristics: One saturated accent — CTech Cobalt — on ≤10% of any screen.
Flat by default; depth from 1px tonal rings and a faint blue backdrop, not shadows.
A single sans (Geist) carries the UI; Geist Mono only for machine-readable strings.
Security states are always icon + text, never color alone.
Bilingual (en / pt-BR); layout holds both without truncation.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: CTech Cobalt appears on ≤10% of any given screen — primary actions, the active selection, and security-affirming state only. Never decoration, never a background wash, never a gradient.

rules.name: The No-Spread Rule
rules.body: Depth is a 1px ring of foreground/10, not a box-shadow. Drop shadows are forbidden on surfaces at rest.

rules.name: The One-Family Rule
rules.body: Geist everywhere; Geist Mono only for values a machine parses. Never introduce a second display face.

rules.name: The Fixed-Scale Rule
rules.body: Sizes are fixed rem on a tight 1.125–1.2 ratio. No clamp() fluid headings.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. The only lift is the 1px ring and the dialog's open transition.

rules.name: The Tint-Not-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Hover and selected states change background tone (muted wells, selected row), not shadow.

dos: Keep CTech Cobalt to primary actions, the active selection, and security-affirming state (≤10% of screen).
Convey security state with icon + text (Verified, Pending, Revoked) — never color alone.
Use Geist Mono for secrets, tokens, client IDs, and CPF masks.
Respect the fixed rem type scale; let sidebar and tables run dense when the task needs it.
Keep flat, ring-based elevation; use muted wells for hover/selected, not shadows.
Hold ≥4.5:1 contrast for body and muted text.
Support both en and pt-BR without truncation or layout shift.
donts: Don't build a Generic pastel SaaS look — airy, thin, substanceless.
Don't make it Gamified consumer — no playful mascots, reward badges, or cartoonish states.
Don't ship Dense enterprise gray — cramped, flat-gray, legacy back-office density.
Don't go Dark-mode hacker — no terminal-only dark aesthetic that excludes non-technical users.
Don't add drop shadows to cards, inputs, or tables at rest.
Don't invent a second display font or pair Geist with a decorative face.
Don't use border-left/border-right >1px as a colored stripe on cards, list rows, or alerts.
Don't use gradient text or a colored gradient wash for the accent.
Don't reach for a modal as the first response — exhaust inline and progressive disclosure first.
Don't reinvent standard affordances (custom scrollbars, non-standard modals, weird form controls).
Don't put heavy full-saturation cobalt on inactive/disabled states.
